cases.name: pos-executed-confirmed
cases.description: Clean executed capsule: confirmed effect (gate_executed), full identity, no verdict_class reason.

cases.name: pos-blocked
cases.description: blocked: a blocking constraint stopped it pre-dispatch; no effect, effect_mode not_applicable.

cases.name: pos-denied
cases.description: denied: operator/policy refused pre-dispatch; not_applicable.

cases.name: pos-hitl-dispatched
cases.description: hitl_dispatched: routed to a human, awaiting resolution; not_applicable, human_disposed false.

cases.name: pos-deferred
cases.description: deferred: a human postponed the decision; human_disposed true, not_applicable.

cases.name: pos-errored
cases.description: errored: action ran and threw, state unknown; effect dispatched -> dispatched_unconfirmed, attestation present.

cases.name: pos-timeout-pre-dispatch
cases.description: timeout before dispatch: no effect -> not_applicable (one timeout value covers both, per §5.4.2).

cases.name: pos-timeout-post-dispatch
cases.description: timeout after dispatch: effect dispatched -> dispatched_unconfirmed, attestation present.

cases.name: pos-confirmed-runtime-claimed
cases.description: confirmed -> effect_attestation REQUIRED (runtime_claimed variant).

cases.name: pos-dispatched-unconfirmed-required
cases.description: dispatched_unconfirmed -> effect_attestation REQUIRED (present).

cases.name: pos-not-applicable-absent
cases.description: not_applicable -> effect_attestation MUST be absent (no effect record).

cases.name: pos-planned-carve
cases.description: planned carve: effect.status planned -> not_applicable, effect_attestation absent; no digests.

cases.name: pos-failed-required
cases.description: failed -> dispatched_unconfirmed, effect_attestation REQUIRED (present). (§6 NOTE, conformant side.)

cases.name: pos-reverted-required
cases.description: reverted -> dispatched_unconfirmed, effect_attestation REQUIRED; underlying effect via external_ref.

cases.name: pos-unknown-effect-attestation
cases.description: unknown effect_attestation value: informational + graded no stronger than runtime_claimed; ok stays true.

cases.name: pos-unknown-verdict-class
cases.description: unknown verdict_class value: informational finding, ok stays true.

cases.name: pos-unknown-effect-type
cases.description: unknown effect.type value: informational finding, ok stays true.

cases.name: pos-supersedes-chain
cases.description: supersedes chain: a hitl_dispatched parent + a superseding resolution capsule; parent's open item is resolved.

cases.name: pos-concurrent-supersedes
cases.description: two supersedes over one parent: earliest in ledger order is authoritative; the later one surfaces an info finding; both remain ok.

cases.name: neg-confirmed-without-response
cases.description: confirmed effect with NO response_digest -> confirmed-effect binding failure (check 3).

cases.name: neg-float-in-digest-field
cases.description: a JSON floating-point value in a digest-bearing field -> structural failure (check 1, §5.1).

cases.name: neg-attestation-present-when-not-applicable
cases.description: planned (not_applicable) with effect_attestation present -> matrix failure (check 5).

cases.name: neg-attestation-missing-when-required
cases.description: failed (dispatched_unconfirmed) with effect_attestation absent -> matrix failure (check 5, the §6 NOTE).

cases.name: neg-never-dispatch-conflict
cases.description: never-dispatch verdict_class (blocked) with a dispatched effect (dispatched_unconfirmed) -> orthogonality failure (check 4).

cases.name: neg-capsule-id-mismatch
cases.description: a field mutated after sealing: capsule_id no longer recomputes over the canonical form (check 2).

cases.name: neg-chain-missing-parent
cases.description: a chain referencing a parent_capsule_id not present in the store -> chain failure (check 6).

cases.name: neg-approver-invalid
cases.description: disposition.approver outside the closed {human, policy} enum (neutral invalid token) -> structural failure (check 1, §5.4).

cases.name: honesty-dishonest-human-disposed
cases.description: human_disposed=true with a non-human (policy) approver in parsed bytes: §6 makes this a structurally-guaranteed invariant, so the verifier reports a NON-GATING defensive warning; ok still reflects the gating checks (here, true).
